scope: independent K=8 dev-only confirmation and timing-specificity diagnostic; no stress, formal validation, or test
random_schedule: within each episode, permute balanced proposal indicators over positions t>=window-1 with a fixed diagnostic RNG; preserves proposal count exactly but is a diagnostic negative control, not a causal model

classification_rule.K8_CONFIRMED_GENERIC_HOLD_REFRESH: K8 noninferiority, positive-seed, causal, and clean gates pass but either timing-specificity gate fails
classification_rule.K8_WEAKNESS_CONFIRMED: K8 noninferiority, positive-seed, causal, or clean gate fails

model_change_after_previous_result: none; only a strictly validated diagnostic schedule override was added
post_result_rule: do not change M1f, seeds, sample count, schedules, or thresholds after reading results
